scripts.check: biome check . && bun --cwd=packages/agent run check && bun --cwd=packages/ai run check && bun --cwd=packages/tui run check && bun --cwd=packages/coding-agent run check && bun run check:gui
scripts.check:gui: bun --cwd=packages/app-server-protocol run check && bun --cwd=packages/app-server-client run check && bun --cwd=packages/app-server run check && bun --cwd=packages/gui run check && bun --cwd=packages/desktop run check
